title: A Gritty Leverage
lines: You pull the rusted crowbar from the rubble. It is a simple tool of iron and leverage, yet in this broken world, it feels like a legendary sword.
The cold metal bites into your palm, a reminder of the physical struggle required to survive. This is not a weapon of grace, but a key to doors that were meant to stay closed.
You weigh the tool in your hand, feeling the balance. It is enough.

options.desc: Head back out into the sewer tunnels
